headline: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About PPL (PPL): Should You Buy?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for PPL (PPL) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on PPL, Lowers Price Target to $43
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst David Arcaro   maintains PPL (NYSE:PPL) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $44 to $43.

headline: Louisville Gas and Electric, Kentucky Utilities - Danville City Commission honors KU lineman for historic achievements
summary: DANVILLE - The Danville City Commission renamed South Street as Leon Smith Way.The honor recognizes Leon Smith's historic contributions to the community as the first African American lineman for...
